events.event_description: Theodore Sedgwick Fay presented credentials as the first Minister Resident to Switzerland, establishing a U.S. Legation.

evidence.quote: Theodore Sedgwick Fay, Minister Resident. Appointed: 1853-03-16. Credentials presented: 1853-06-29. Presented recall on 1861-07-01.

events.event_description: Frances Elizabeth Willis presented credentials as the first Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary to Switzerland, elevating the mission from a Legation to an Embassy.

evidence.quote: Frances Elizabeth Willis, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1953-07-20. Credentials presented: 1953-10-09. Left post on 1957-05-05.
